title: calea uniflora var. discoidea
intro: Calea uniflora var. discoidea, also known as the Mexican Dream Herb, is a species of plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, due to its sedative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calea uniflora var. discoidea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal properties.
